description: Fix false staleness positives in orchestrator.ts lines 473-480: @exports tag written by --source-headers uses scanner's exported-elements set; staleness check compares against rawExports (different TS/JS traversal, also filters default exports at line 476). Divergence causes files like ConversionOptions, convertGraphToElements, getConversionStats to be marked stale incorrectly. Fix: normalize both paths to the same extractor, or make the mismatch-check tolerance-aware.
